title: Add proof-of-API integration test for ferrolearn-kernel
description:
Final step of #250. tests/api_proof.rs covering every public API:
- KernelRidge: builders, fit, predict, score
- Nystroem: builders, fit, transform, KernelType variants
- RBFSampler: builders, fit, transform
- GaussianProcessRegressor: builders, fit, predict, predict_with_std, sample_y, log_marginal_likelihood, score
- GaussianProcessClassifier: builders, fit, predict, predict_proba, predict_log_proba, log_marginal_likelihood, score
- GP kernels: RBF, Matern (variants), Constant, White, DotProduct, Sum/Product composition
- Local kernel-regression family (NadarayaWatson, LocalPolynomialRegression) since they're public
- Module-level helpers: scott_bandwidth, silverman_bandwidth, CrossValidatedBandwidth, heteroscedasticity_test, residual_diagnostics, etc.
- Standard kernel functions (Gaussian/Epanechnikov/etc.) via the Kernel trait
